modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Files synced with Box are not accessible on Windows 10.

full_description_text: I am having a problem with files that are synced using Box. They are not available on my Windows 10 system. I tried to access them, but they just don't show up. This issue is really frustrating as I need those files for my work.
short_description: Files synced with Box are not accessible on Windows 10.
description: I am having a problem with files that are synced using Box. They are not available on my Windows 10 system. I tried to access them, but they just don't show up. This issue is really frustrating as I need those files for my work.
